top_signals.title: Taiwan Says Sovereignty Cannot be Violated
top_signals.summary: Taiwan's maritime sovereignty cannot be "violated" by Chinese efforts to create a false impression of jurisdiction, the island's coast guard said after China ended a patrol off its eastern shores.China, which claims democratically governed Taiwan as its own territory…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Turns to Military to Beef Up Security After Exam Scandals
top_signals.summary: India is taking unprecedented measures to restore confidence in its national student examination system after a series of scandals fueled angry protests from young people and put pressure on Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
